calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Not Requiring Petitioner To Post Bond
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carol Hoffman, via ZOOM, for Elaine Katzenberger, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The court asks if anyone is appearing to object to the petition before the court, in this matter. None are presented. Ms. Hoffman notes that all heirs have consented to the petition, so she did not anticipate anyone to make an appearance to object.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Order, etc. is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Obilinatto. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Not Requiring Petitioner To Post Bond
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Continued To Feb-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
